EQUIPMENT
Flamer Plstol: Flamer pistols are simply cul-down version of the man-pack: Tney suffer from shorter range and much smaller payload but they are favored in some circles because of their smaller size. Heavy Flamer: More akin the flamers used BattleMechs than the ma pack; the heawy flamer covers the same area but Inflicts considerably more damage_ The fuel used even more volatile , making nazardous to its crew: If the crew is hit Dy ranged attack; the gamemaster rolls 2010_ result of 18 greater; the heavy   flamer's fuel source explodes and causes the heavy flamer" damage blast effect (damage type X} from the crew as the point of impact:
Recoil Compensators Burst-fire weapons are effective, but the recoil generated finng stream of projectiles at high speed massive. Many devices have been developed t0 reduce the effect of recoil; with varying degrees of success_ One of the most common kinds of recoil compensation gas-vent system that vents the weapon barrel gases at specific vector t0 counter barrel climb_ Support weapons can benefit from gyroscopic harness mounts_ In game terms, if wcapon equipped with any recoil com pensation, it increases the cost ad weight of the weapon by 10 percent; but the weapon' recoil rating increased Dy one point. weapon with recoil rating of 2 (+1 TN Modifier for every two shots fired burst) titted with recoil compensation would have recoil rating of 3 and suffer instead +1 penalty per three shots tired. In addition recoil compensation makes weapon bulkier and more difficult to conceal: apply -3 TN Moditier t0 tne Perception Check any character trying spot such concealed weapon;
Sonic Stunner The sonic stunner; like the stunstick; i5 nonlethal weapon meant render target unconscious It projects an ultra high frequency sound that can stun or knock out the target. The sonic stunner cannot cause wounds; It has the same potential to stun und knock out characters as the stunstick (see 1341. Amor nas no effect on sonic stunner; Any character wearing battle dlinor Oi equipped with bionic replacements in both ears can fil ter out the sonic stunner blast and immune t0 the weapon;
Silencer Lower-tech than the JAF-05_ but significantly more common and cheaper, the standard silencer has been around for more than thousand years. It reduces the firing noise and muzzie flash any slug-throwing pistol, rifle SMG sucn that Perception Checks have +4 TN Modifier to detect the fring However; common silencer becomes useless after repeated use; if character rolls fumble while using silencer; ceas function silencer adds barrel length. making the weapon more difficult to conceal: apply ~2 TN Modifier t0 the Perception Check of any character trying spot concealed weapon with silencer attached. The silencer can be carried separately ad attached in combat; which Complex Action.
WEAPON ACCESSORIES multitude of accessories and addons for just about any type of weapon are available few of the most common and useful accessories are Iisted here
Holsters Most holsters are worn on belts; though shoulder-style hol: sters are also popular Concealable holsters _ Wonm underneath clothing; are also available, accommodating small pistols.
JAF-05 Flash Suppressor The JAF 05 was developed during the Star League era as standard accessory that could be mounted t0 any SLDF infantry rifle laser slug-thrower:   Utilizing number advanced technologies, the JAF05 can all but eliminate tne muzzle flashes from slug-throwing rifles and even the chromat: ourst from laser rifle. As an added benefit, sonic damp ener reduces the report from   slug-throwing   rifles soldier equipped with JAF 05 can operate at night with little chance of an enemy picking up on the sound or sight of his weapon fire. Cnaracters must make Perception Check at +4 TN penalty to successfully notice someone using JAF-05 (the penalty negated tne character making the roll is using a infrared detector; as the JAF-05 cannot mask the weapon heat signa ture).
Telescopic Scope Sometimes called sniper scopes these magnify much like pair binoculars or standard telescope. The scope i5 nor: mally fitted t0 rifle , allowing shooter t0 better aim his or her weapon; Characters making use of telescopic scope must be braced and stationary; but they gain Modifier to their TNs atmedium_ long and extreme  ranges; Standard telescopic sights cannot be used in darkness nor d0 Iney provide any elec tronic information_ Other versions of these scopes are available (see Night Vision Scopes above and Rangefinder Binoculars; 149).
POWER PACKS AND CHARGERS Energy weapons ad electronic devices feed off power source Some simply draw powe from cumimom house hold industrial outlet; though this option may be inconvenient unavailable Portable power packs fulfill the need to find permanent source of power; though sooner or later their charge will dissipate. Once they run ary; power packs must recharged before they can be used again.
Nlght Vision Scopes Night vision scopes function like standard telescopic scopes with nignt vision features (see Night Vision Devices; 1491, Characters receive the night vision bonus only when fir- ing the weapon; the scope is inconvenient to use otherwise aoding +1 Modifier t0 Perception and other Checks_
